mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wrong_note (user_id, answer_id, added_type) VALUES (#{userId}, #{answerId}, #{addedType})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, answer_id, added_type, resolved, resolved_at, created_at FROM wrong_note WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE wrong_note SET resolved = #{resolved}, resolved_at = CASE WHEN #{resolved} = TRUE THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END WHERE id = #{id}
